typography.headings: Playfair Display or Cormorant Garamond (Serif) for elegant luxury
typography.body: Lato, Montserrat, or similar clean sans-serif for legibility

hierarchy.h3: font-size: 1rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--sage); margin-bottom: 0.5rem;

layout_and_spacing.grid: CSS Grid for overall layout: 1fr on mobile, 1fr 1fr on desktop (Left: Sticky Preview, Right: Steps Form)
layout_and_spacing.options_grid: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem;
layout_and_spacing.cards: border: 1px solid rgba(200, 160, 80, 0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; background: #fff; text-align: center;

cake_preview_css_logic.structure: A relative container acting as a cake stand, with absolute positioned div elements representing tiers stacked on top of each other.
cake_preview_css_logic.tier_styles: border-radius: 8px 8px 3px 3px; box-shadow: inset 0 -5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: background-color 0.5s ease, opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease;
cake_preview_css_logic.dynamic_updates: JS updates background-color of tiers based on selected frosting. JS toggles display/opacity of tiers based on selected number of tiers. Toppings are small absolute positioned elements (CSS pseudo-elements or inner divs) on the top tier.

step_4.title: Decorations
step_4.note: Allow multiple selections via checkboxes styled as cards.

interactions_and_js.navigation: Hide/show step containers by removing/adding a 'hidden' class. Animate opacity on entry. Update a visual progress bar width (e.g., 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100%) and activate step indicators.
interactions_and_js.state_management: Use a global JS object `let cakeState = {...}` to store current selections. Update this object via 'change' event listeners on inputs.
interactions_and_js.preview_sync: On state update, immediately reflect changes in the visual preview (e.g., change tier height based on size, color based on frosting, number of elements based on tiers).
interactions_and_js.submission: On the final step, format `cakeState` into a readable string and set `window.location.href = 'mailto:evridiki@example.com?subject=Custom Cake Order&body=' + encodeURIComponent(orderText);` or equivalent WhatsApp link.

image_urls.description: Elegant cake flatlay to use subtly in the background or final success state.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='step-1-next', data-testid='option-vanilla', data-testid='submit-order'). Add data-testid to step containers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a vanilla HTML/CSS/JS solution (no React). Build a 2-column layout on desktop (Sticky CSS visual cake preview on left, Scrolling wizard on right). Use the CSS variables explicitly requested (--cream, --rose, --sage, --choc, --gold). Build radio/checkbox inputs visually as clickable cards. Ensure a '100% Gluten-Free' badge is prominent. Make sure step transitions are smooth using CSS transitions. Implement logic to generate the summary text and trigger mailto/whatsapp link on submit.
